chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.932 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application --------------------------------------------- 05.05.2025 Applicant in person Mr. Zahoor Shah, Addl: P.G. Sindh Complainant present in person ------------------------------------ Applicant/accused Salman Shah son of Haroon Shah seeks pre-arrest bail in FIR No.429/2024, registered at P.S. Boat Basin, Karachi for offence under section 489-F, PPC. During pendency of this criminal bail application, parties have settled their dispute outside the Court and one Muhammad Khusru Shah son of Syed Jawed Nazim Ali Shah, holding CNIC No.42501-6713938-7, present in Court today, has furnished postdated Cheque No.A-27364825 of 18.05.2025, drawn on Meezan Bank, Abul Hassan Isphani Road Branch, Karachi of an amount of Rs.1,900,000/- (Rupees Nineteen Lac), which is handed over to complainant Peerzada Amjad Hussain. Applicant/ accused Salman Shah, Muhammad Khusru Shah and complainant Peerzada Amjad Hussain have signed the joint statement on the photocopy of aforesaid cheque, which is taken on record. Applicant Salman Shah and Muhammad Khusru Shah submit that they are responsible for payment of aforesaid cheque dated 18.05.2025 and if the cheque is dishonoured, second FIR would be registered against them for dishonouring of the said cheque, without any orders from the Court and the complainant is also at liberty to move application for cancellation of bail directly before this Court. Interim pre-arrest bail granted to applicant/accused Salman Shah son of Haroon Shah by this Court vide order dated 11.04.2025 is confirmed on the above terms.

Applicant Salman Shah and Muhammad Khusru Shah submit that they are responsible for payment of aforesaid cheque dated 18.05.2025 and if the cheque is dishonoured, second FIR would be registered against them for dishonouring of the said cheque, without any orders from the Court and the complainant is also at liberty to move application for cancellation of bail directly before this Court. Interim pre-arrest bail granted to applicant/accused Salman Shah son of Haroon Shah by this Court vide order dated 11.04.2025 is confirmed on the above terms. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
